evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; max age 90 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~* Have an established diagnosis of ATTR-CM with either wild-type TTR or variant TTR genotype~* Have a history of heart failure evidenced by at least one prior hospitalization for heart failure or clinical evidence of heart failure without prior heart failure hospitalization manifested by signs or symptoms of volume overload or elevated intracardiac pressures or heart failure symptoms that required or require ongoing treatment with a diuretic.~* New York Heart Association (NY...
